steps: File NTA Form 11 refund claim with MUFG Custody for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Submit treaty rate certificate confirming JP-NO treaty 10% rate applies to Norwegian beneficial owner
Request MUFG provide detailed tax calculation breakdown showing 9% vs 10% withholding applied
Follow up within 30 days if no response from custodian on refund processing

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
